title: Přerov, Olomouc — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Přerov, Olomouc: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Přerov is a city in Olomouc with a population of 42,000. A historic Moravian city on the Bečva River, known for its Renaissance chateau, archaeological finds, and strategic railway junction.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
